title: taraxacum stenophyllum
intro: Taraxacum stenophyllum, commonly known as the narrow-leaved dandelion, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion genus. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is traditionally used to treat various health issues such as digestive problems, fever, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Taraxacum stenophyllum include its ability to support liver function, improve digestion, and reduce inflammation in the body. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves, roots, and flowers are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
